mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_history (user_id, session_id, role, content, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{createTime})

INSERT INTO ai_chat_history (user_id, session_id, role, content, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.sessionId}, #{item.role}, #{item.content}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, session_id, role, content, create_time FROM ai_chat_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT t1.session_id AS sessionId, CONCAT( LEFT(t1.content, 20), ' ', DATE_FORMAT(t1.create_time, '%m-%d %H:%i') ) AS sessionName FROM ai_chat_history t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT session_id, MIN(id) AS min_id FROM ai_chat_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND role = 'user' GROUP BY session_id ) t2 ON t1.id = t2.min_id ORDER BY (SELECT MAX(create_time) FROM ai_chat_history WHERE session_id = t1.session_id) DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ai_chat_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_id = #{sessionId}
